name: White Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight.
2. Cook the beans in water with the ham hocks and onions until nearly done.
3. Remove the ham hocks and take the meat off the bones.
4. Put the meat back into the beans and add the remaining ingredients (chili sauce, catsup, brown sugar, mustard, salt, pepper, and water).
5. Bottle and pressure cook for 1 hour at 10 pounds of pressure.
6. Makes about 30 pints.
When I made mine, I used a medium size shoulder ham roast instead of the ham hocks and added more mustard.
